steps.title: Match both volcano types
steps.content: The student wants an example showing that Ecuador has different types of volcanoes. The choice must name two Ecuadorian volcanoes and classify each one according to the table.

steps.title: Remove table mismatches
steps.content: Choice A misclassifies Sumaco. Choice B misclassifies Cuicocha. Choice C misclassifies Cayambe. The remaining choice uses two table-supported classifications, identifying Cuicocha as a caldera volcano and Santiago as a stratovolcano. The answer is D.
